column1: # Institutional level for organizations CREATED from the JSON dump.
# kind  = "prefix" (matches the leading type token of the org label) or
#         "exact" (matches the full org label; checked before prefixes)
# key   = the prefix or exact label to match
# level = InstitutionalLevel.name to assign (get_or_create'd if new).
#         Use the literal REVIEW to mark an undecided type: the command will
#         NOT create orgs of that type and will list them in its report.
